requirement_topic.en: CAM Type Approval (Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment)
requirement_topic.zh: CAM型式认可（无线电/电信终端设备）
requirement_topic.zht: CAM型式認可（無線電/電信終端設備）

summary.en: Mandatory CAM (Communications Authority of Maldives) type approval is required for all radio and telecommunications terminal equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, IoT) before import or sale in the Maldives under Telecommunications Act 2/2016. The applicant must submit a technical file and test reports from an accredited laboratory; CE and FCC test reports are accepted as supporting evidence to facilitate the CAM approval process but do not substitute for the CAM certificate itself. A CAM type approval certificate must be obtained prior to importation or commercialisation. The 5 GHz band is subject to indoor-use restrictions.
summary.zh: 依据马尔代夫2016年第2号电信法，所有无线电和电信终端设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、物联网）在进口或销售前须取得CAM（马尔代夫通信局）强制型式认可。申请人须提交技术文件及经认可实验室出具的测试报告；CE和FCC测试报告可作为辅助证明材料以便利CAM审批流程，但不可替代CAM证书本身。进口或商业化前须取得CAM型式认可证书。5 GHz频段受室内使用限制。
summary.zht: 依據馬爾地夫2016年第2號電信法，所有無線電和電信終端設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂巢、物聯網）在進口或銷售前須取得CAM（馬爾地夫通訊局）強制型式認可。申請人須提交技術文件及經認可實驗室出具的測試報告；CE和FCC測試報告可作為輔助證明材料以便利CAM審批流程，但不可替代CAM證書本身。進口或商業化前須取得CAM型式認可證書。5 GHz頻段受室內使用限制。

standards_or_laws: CAM Type Approval Procedures and Guidelines
CAM spectrum and frequency allocation regulations

summary.en: China MIIT/SRRC radio type approval (for intentional radiators) and MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for terminal equipment, based on GB standards (GB 15629 series for Wi-Fi; YD/T standards for cellular/BT). CCC certification covers certain RF module components. SRRC and NAL are not recognised by CAM.
summary.zh: 中国MIIT/SRRC无线电型式核准（针对有意辐射体）及MIIT网络接入许可证（NAL，针对终端设备），基于GB标准（Wi-Fi适用GB 15629系列；蜂窝/蓝牙适用YD/T标准）。CCC认证涵盖部分射频模块组件。SRRC及NAL不被CAM认可。
summary.zht: 中國MIIT/SRRC無線電型式核准（針對有意輻射體）及MIIT網路接入許可證（NAL，針對終端設備），基於GB標準（Wi-Fi適用GB 15629系列；蜂巢/藍牙適用YD/T標準）。CCC認證涵蓋部分射頻模組元件。SRRC及NAL不被CAM認可。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Administrative Measures on Radio Equipment (2022)

gap.en: Full gap: separate CAM type approval certificate required. Chinese SRRC, NAL, and CCC are not recognised by CAM. CE/FCC test reports may be submitted as supporting evidence but a new CAM application is mandatory. 5 GHz indoor restriction must be noted in technical documentation.
gap.zh: 完全差距：须另行取得CAM型式认可证书。中国SRRC、NAL及CCC均不被CAM认可。CE/FCC测试报告可作为辅助材料提交，但须强制申请CAM认可。技术文件中须注明5 GHz室内使用限制。
gap.zht: 完全差距：須另行取得CAM型式認可證書。中國SRRC、NAL及CCC均不被CAM認可。CE/FCC測試報告可作為輔助材料提交，但須強制申請CAM認可。技術文件中須注明5 GHz室內使用限制。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC/NAL/CCC documentation does not satisfy CAM type approval. A separate CAM application with accredited lab test reports is required before the device may be imported or sold in the Maldives. CE/FCC reports may support the application but are not substitutes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC/NAL/CCC文件不满足CAM型式认可要求。设备在马尔代夫进口或销售前，须另行提交CAM申请，并附上经认可实验室出具的测试报告。CE/FCC报告可辅助申请，但不可替代CAM认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC/NAL/CCC文件不滿足CAM型式認可要求。裝置在馬爾地夫進口或銷售前，須另行提交CAM申請，並附上經認可實驗室出具的測試報告。CE/FCC報告可輔助申請，但不可替代CAM認可。
